Your Trusted Seattle Tree Removal Partner

Tree Service By Northwest started with a simple goal: to provide reliable and professional tree care to our neighbors in Seattle. We're not just a business; we're a team of experienced arborists who care deeply about the health and safety of our urban forest.

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our tree removal services.

How much does tree removal cost?

The cost depends on several factors, including the size and location of the tree, the complexity of the removal, and the amount of cleanup required. We offer free estimates to provide you with an accurate price.

Do I need a permit to remove a tree?

In many cases, a permit is required to remove a tree in Seattle. We can help you determine if a permit is needed and assist with the application process.

What do you do with the removed tree?

We strive to be environmentally responsible. We recycle as much of the tree as possible, turning it into mulch, firewood, or other useful products.

Reviews From Our Tree Removal Customers

See what our satisfied customers have to say about their experience.

"Tree Service By Northwest did an amazing job removing a large, dying maple from my backyard. The crew was professional, efficient, and very careful not to damage my fence or landscaping. Highly recommend!"

Maria S. Tree Removal

"I had two old stumps that were an eyesore in my front yard. Tree Service By Northwest came out and ground them down quickly and cleanly. The price was reasonable, and the service was excellent."

David B. Stump Grinding

"Our apple tree was overgrown and not producing much fruit. Tree Service By Northwest pruned it expertly, and now it looks healthier than ever. Looking forward to a better harvest next year!"

Jessica K. Tree Pruning
